style_suffix: 4K healing humanistic city documentary, retro cream film aesthetic, soft warm cream lighting, low contrast, subtle 35mm film grain, atmospheric soft glow, authentic LOCAL street life of {city_name} ONLY, unique regional architecture signage and dialect culture, handheld slow motion, NOT generic Chinese tourist hotspot, NOT Chengdu Chongqing Xi'an Shanghai generic stock footage
negative_prompt: generic tourist city, neon cyberpunk, high contrast digital, stock footage watermark, crowded landmark selfie spot, modern glass skyscraper downtown

scenes.prompt_core: {city_name} old alley specialty shop at dawn, weathered wooden door, local handwritten signboard, {local_shop_type}, cream morning light, empty quiet lane
scenes.camera: handheld slow push/pull, subtle camera sway
